# PeasyAudio Embed Widget

> Embeddable PeasyAudio widgets for any website. Zero dependencies, Shadow DOM isolation, 4 themes (light/dark/sepia/auto).

## Quick Start

Add to any HTML page:
- Script: <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/peasy-audio-embed@1/dist/embed.min.js"></script>

## Links

- Main site: https://peasyaudio.com
- Widget docs: https://widget.peasyaudio.com
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/peasy-audio-embed
- GitHub: https://github.com/peasytools/peasy-audio-embed
- API: https://peasyaudio.com/developers/

## Peasy Tools Widget Family

- [PeasyTools Widget](https://widget.peasytools.com)
- [PeasyPDF Widget](https://widget.peasypdf.com)
- [PeasyImage Widget](https://widget.peasyimage.com)
- [PeasyText Widget](https://widget.peasytext.com)
- [PeasyVideo Widget](https://widget.peasyvideo.com)
- [PeasyCSS Widget](https://widget.peasycss.com)
- [PeasyDesign Widget](https://widget.peasydesign.com)
- [PeasyDev Widget](https://widget.peasydev.com)
- [PeasyFormats Widget](https://widget.peasyformats.com)
- [PeasyGen Widget](https://widget.peasygen.com)
- [PeasyMath Widget](https://widget.peasymath.com)
- [PeasyQR Widget](https://widget.peasyqr.com)
- [PeasySafe Widget](https://widget.peasysafe.com)
- [PeasySEO Widget](https://widget.peasyseo.com)
- [PeasySocial Widget](https://widget.peasysocial.com)
